content: Documentation audit system initialized on 2026-01-24. Tracks stale docs >30 days, missing docstrings, and module README coverage.
Documentation patterns collection initialized. Stores successful documentation templates, ADR examples, and reusable module README structures.
Code examples repository initialized. Stores validated, tested code snippets for documentation. Examples include CLV calculations, Elo ratings, Kelly sizing, and data leakage prevention patterns.

Week 1 foundation complete (2026-01-24): Created 3 templates (module README, ADR, docstring examples), implemented doc_metrics.py with git-based staleness tracking, added 4 pre-commit hooks (pydocstyle, interrogate, markdownlint, doc-coverage-report), initialized 3 memory namespaces (docs-audit, doc-patterns, code-examples), generated baseline report (90.1% docstring coverage, 0% module README coverage, 16 ADRs). Next: Week 2 critical docs (8 module READMEs, expand DATA_DICTIONARY, complete RUNBOOK).
